name: Artoria Lancer and Artoria Lancer Alter
description:
Description: Artoria Lancer is the Lancer variations of the original Artoria Pendragon, who chose to wield the divine lance Rhongomyniad instead of Excalibur. Artoria Lancer Alter is the corrupted, Alter version of Artoria Lancer.

Series: Fate/Grand Order - FGO
creator: Chunter
